message:
fix(collect): relax resident-pages assertion for freshly spawned processes

Remove assertion that resident pages must be non-zero in statm parsing
tests. Freshly spawned lightweight processes may have zero resident pages
if their pages haven't been faulted in yet, making the previous assertion
flaky on fast systems. Virtual size (non-zero) remains asserted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
